file_insights.structure: Complete macOS bundle with metadata and specification

key_files.meta.json: Card configuration with 38 properties including provider chain, stage models, timeouts
key_files.spec.md: Task specification defining e2e factory testing scope and acceptance criteria
key_files.prompt.md: Templated prompt using handlebars variables ({{system_context}}, {{spec}}, etc.)
key_files.Logs.webloc: macOS web location pointing to bop://card/e2e-factory-test/tail

patterns_discovered.description: Cards use .bop bundle format with macOS Info.plist, metadata.json, spec.md, prompt.md templates
patterns_discovered.implications: Standardized card format enables consistent processing across factory workflow

patterns_discovered.description: Card defines stage_chain [implement, qa] with per-stage models (opus for implement, sonnet for qa), providers, budgets
patterns_discovered.implications: Sequential processing with model/budget isolation per stage

patterns_discovered.description: provider_chain: [claude, codex, ollama-local] enables graceful degradation
patterns_discovered.implications: Automatic failover if primary provider unavailable

patterns_discovered.description: prompt.md uses {{variable}} syntax for dynamic content injection (spec, stage_instructions, acceptance_criteria)
patterns_discovered.implications: Card prompts are generated at dispatch time with contextual information

patterns_discovered.description: acceptance_criteria field contains executable checks: ['cargo test', 'cargo clippy -- -D warnings']

gotchas_discovered.description: Card ID uses 🃁 (U+1F0C1 playing card glyph) in bundle path, may cause encoding issues on non-UTF8 systems
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure all path handling uses UTF-8 encoding, test on various filesystems

gotchas_discovered.description: QuickLook/Thumbnail.png included in version control, increases repo size
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider gitattributes for binary handling or generate thumbnails at bundle creation time

gotchas_discovered.description: timeout_seconds: 3600 (1 hour) for e2e test may cause slow feedback loops
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Monitor actual execution time; adjust if factory/dispatcher overhead is lower than expected

gotchas_discovered.description: Info.plist uses 'sh.bop.template-implement' which matches template namespace but not card-specific ID
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify bundling system handles identifier collision for multiple cards

approach_outcome.summary: Created complete e2e-factory-test bop card bundle with proper metadata, specification, and templating
approach_outcome.test_readiness: Card includes acceptance criteria (cargo test, cargo clippy) and is ready for factory dispatcher
approach_outcome.workflow_alignment: Card follows bop factory conventions: implements → QA stage progression, provider fallback chain, WatchPaths trigger
approach_outcome.scope_adherence: Specification correctly scopes test to factory/dispatcher workflow; excludes agent behavior and error recovery details

recommendations.recommendation: Audit all file path operations for UTF-8 emoji support; test card discovery on macOS Finder and CLI both
recommendations.rationale: Emoji glyphs in paths can cause silent failures in path resolution, especially across tool boundaries

recommendations.recommendation: Add timeout reduction target: measure actual factory install + dispatch cycle time and reduce 3600s timeout to 120-300s if feasible
recommendations.rationale: Faster feedback loops improve development velocity; 1-hour timeouts mask performance regressions

recommendations.recommendation: Auto-generate card metadata (created timestamp, glyph selection) via factory CLI to reduce manual JSON editing
recommendations.rationale: Manual JSON creation is error-prone; factory tool should enforce schema validation

recommendations.recommendation: Verify Info.plist CFBundleIdentifier uniqueness constraint; consider auto-generating from card ID to prevent collisions
recommendations.rationale: Multiple cards with identical bundle identifiers could cause registration conflicts in QL extension system

recommendations.recommendation: Next iteration: add concurrent card processing test and rate-limit error recovery (exit code 75) handling to complement this e2e test
recommendations.rationale: Current test covers happy path; concurrent/error paths will uncover dispatcher scalability issues
